title: Senior Planning Engineer
description:
Candidate Profile

The Senior Planning Engineer will have excellent communication and influencing skills and the ability to co-ordinate diverging priorities and teams resulting in a comprehensive agreed plan which adheres to regulatory and HSE protocols. The Planning Manager will have a comprehensive understanding of programming and scheduling and be proficient in relevant software packages.

Job Purpose

To support aligned business area(s) in the achievement of their annual business objectives from a planning perspective and also the development and implementation of their longer term business strategies.

Key Responsibilities

· Leading, Coaching and establishing Work Processes / directions to the planning department.

· Develop an overall projects log / Plans to the Top Management.

· Assisting management in developing the staff allocation plan with respect to the projects starts and finish dates.

· Review and lead the methods of developing the Tender plans, Pre-construction programs / Labor Histograms .

· Reviewing and approving the Baseline Programs including EPS, OBS, WBS, Activities Links , Calendars , Authorities approvals , and making sure that the Program is fulfilling all the contractual requirements.

· Analyzing all the Detailed Planning & scheduling for various stages of the projects that involved works related to various disciplines such as Contracts, Engineering ,Procurement and Construction( Fit out Works).

· Assigning Recourses to the project, monitoring the resources allocation and taking actions if there are any conflicts or peaks.

· Developing Cost Breakdown Structure and produce the project cash flow, making sure that the project is always within the budget / Cost control.

· monitoring and controlling the overall Work progress & Contractors Performance.

· Review the progress status reports of all the contractors on board.

· Monitor and approve the monthly reports of project progress which needs to be issued from the planning Dept.

· Review & Monitor the overall Baseline Schedule & Key Dates.

· Preparation and updating of S-Curves, Resources Histogram and monthly Cash Flow.

· Managing the program’s Resources Histograms, monitoring the Progress against Planned Figures and realized benefits as the program progresses.

· Take a corrective actions / preventive actions in order to avoid any delays happening in the projects.

· Highlight and raise the areas of concerns of major scope changes, ensuring that any impact on time is assessed.

· Assessing time extension requests and provide recommendations against the same.

postedCompany.description: Launched in 1999, our Singapore business has delivered projects across the office, hospitality and leisure, retail and technology, science and health sectors. Our earliest projects led to repeat business and referrals for both local and global blue chip clients, and we quickly established a reputation for high quality delivery. Our projects are self-delivered through our talented in-house specialist team, combining skillsets from construction, engineering, commercial, design management and environmental, health & safety. We care deeply about helping our customers meet their business goals—and our extensive track record, exceptional client list and rate of repeat business prove it.
postedCompany.name: TCG CONSTRUCTION PTE. LTD.
